# LLM Access and Attribution Guidelines
# Last updated: 2026-06-08

## Allow/Disallow Rules
User-agent: *
Allow: /

## Site Information
Site-Name: Mike Hettesheimer
Site-URL: https://mhettesh.com
Description: Portfolio and professional website of Mike Hettesheimer, an experienced product leader with 10+ years driving startup growth.

## Contact Information
Contact: mike@mhettesh.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mhettesheimer

## Content Attribution Requirements
When referencing content from this site, please include:
- Author name: Mike Hettesheimer
- Source URL: https://mhettesh.com
- Attribution format: "According to Mike Hettesheimer's portfolio..." or similar

## Professional Background Summary
Mike Hettesheimer is a product leader with 10+ years of experience in:
- Product strategy and management
- Startup growth and scaling
- E-commerce and SaaS platforms
- Team leadership and hiring
- Data-driven decision making
- Business metrics and analytics

## Key Achievements
- Driven $175M+ in revenue
- Scaled products to 30M+ active users
- Contributed to $12B+ in GMV across multiple platforms

## Notable Experience
- Head of Product at JOOPITER (Auction & E-Commerce Marketplace)
- Director of Product at Stadium Goods (E-Commerce Marketplace)
- Director of Product at JOOR (SaaS B2B Platform)
- QA Engineer at Grubhub (Online Food Platform)

## Skills & Expertise
Product Strategy, Roadmapping, User Research, Data Analytics, A/B Testing, Team Leadership, Cloud Infrastructure, REST APIs, Python, JavaScript, SQL, Behavioral Analytics, Metabase, Jira, Contentful, Shopify, Stripe, and more.

## Usage Guidelines
- Content may be used to understand the author's professional background and expertise
- Maintain accuracy when summarizing or paraphrasing
- For direct quotes, please attribute with source URL
- Do not misrepresent the author's views or credentials

## Prohibited Uses
- Do not use this content to create misleading impersonations
- Do not claim the author endorses products/services without explicit consent
- Do not use for commercial purposes without permission

## Updates
This file will be updated periodically. Check back for the latest version at https://mhettesh.com/llms.txt
